case_title: JONATHAN EISENMANN VS. KINESIS STUDIO INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF EISENMANN, JONATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT KINESIS STUDIO INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
